compiled_state.title: [skip-review-check.sh]: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT unbound under set -u -> tests/scripts/test-skip-review-check.sh fails 7/17, tests/hooks/test-behavioral-equivalence-allowlist.sh fails 20/39
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

plugins/dso/scripts/skip-review-check.sh references \${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} at lines 20 AND 40 while `set -u` is active. When invoked outside a Claude Code session that pre-exports CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT (e.g. via test isolation), the unbound variable triggers exit 1 before allowlist loading runs.

## Reproduction
- unset CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT && echo 'snapshots/foo' | bash plugins/dso/scripts/skip-review-check.sh
- Observed: "line 20: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT: unbound variable"; exit 1
- Expected: classify file via allowlist; exit 0/1 per pattern match

## Test failures
- tests/scripts/test-skip-review-check.sh: 7/17 fail
- tests/hooks/test-behavioral-equivalence-allowlist.sh: 20/39 fail

## Fix
Same pattern as 09d8-11f0: derive _PLUGIN_ROOT from BASH_SOURCE with CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT fallback. Affects both line 19 (config-paths) and line 40 (allowlist file).

comments.body: Classification: mechanical (set -u + unbound variable; same pattern as 09d8-11f0; deterministic fix).
comments.author: Test
